error.title: Pause in your travel log
error.description: We hit a bump on the route, but your trips and memories are safe.
error.hint: Pick an action below and we will get you back on track.
error.support: If this keeps happening, contact us and we will help you continue the journey.

operational.readOnlyBanner: Keeptrip is in Read-Only mode. Your data is safe, but edits are paused.
operational.readOnlyBlockedAction: Keeptrip is in Read-Only mode. Your data is safe, but edits are paused.
operational.maintenanceMessage: Explorer's Rest: We are upgrading the engines. Your trips are safe in the vault. We'll be right back.
operational.maintenanceHint: No action is needed from your side. We will restore routes as soon as system checks are complete.
